components.verification.a11y.illustratio: An illustration showing that Bluesky selects trusted verifiers, and trusted verifiers in turn verify individual user accounts.
components.verification.about.trustedVer: Accounts with a scalloped blue check mark {#t0/} can verify others. These trusted verifiers are selected by Bluesky.
components.verification.cta.learnMore: Learn more about verification on Bluesky
components.verification.description.notV: This account has one or more attempted verifications, but it is not currently verified.
components.verification.description.veri: This account has a checkmark because it's been verified by trusted sources.
components.verification.error.someInvali: Some of your verifications are invalid.
